mapper.select:
SELECT ping.mgr_seq, ping.lyr_mgr_seq, ping.ip_field_en_nm, ping.ip_field_kr_nm, ping.interval_min, ping.last_work_dat, ping.total_cnt, ping.fail_cnt, ping.reg_usr_id
,lyr.schem_nm ,lyr.tbl_id ,lyr.lyr_nm
,(SELECT EXISTS (SELECT FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = lyr.schem_nm AND table_name = lyr.tbl_id)) as is_exists_table ,(SELECT EXISTS (SELECT FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = lyr.schem_nm AND table_name = lyr.tbl_id AND column_name = ping.ip_field_en_nm)) as is_exists_column
FROM xeus.gis_nms_ping AS ping
LEFT JOIN xeus.gis_lyr_list AS lyr ON ping.lyr_mgr_seq = lyr.mgr_seq
AND ping.mgr_seq = #{mgrSeq}
